scripts.build:capacitor: tsc -b && vite build --config vite.capacitor.config.ts && node scripts/capacitor-postbuild.mjs
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:capacitor && npx cap sync && node scripts/patch-ios-xcode-build.mjs && node scripts/patch-ios-entitlements.mjs && node scripts/patch-ios-url-scheme.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-oauth.mjs
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:run:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap run ios
scripts.cap:run:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap run android
scripts.stripe:deploy: supabase functions deploy create-checkout-session && supabase functions deploy confirm-checkout-session && supabase functions deploy stripe-webhook && supabase functions deploy verify-store-purchase
